arts.ttl: The rise of Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala—Part 6: Taking defensive lessons from…Miroslav Klose?
arts.sum: “I have to thank Miroslav Klose a lot for that time, because he was my coach on the U-17s, and he showed me no mercy”, Musiala said (via Players’ Tribune ). What if I told you that Klose was the first person who taught Musiala defensive drills with Bayern Munich ’s U17s?

arts.ttl: Mainz 05 vs. Bayern Munich: Live stream, Game time thread, How to watch
arts.sum: While you’re waiting for the game, why not check out our preview podcast? Bayern Munich will go on the road for one last time this year before the winter break, heading to Mainz’s ground to pick up maximum points.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s threat from set pieces has resulted in a new league record
arts.sum: You might have heard Arsenal FC making the rounds on social media for relying heavily on set pieces to score goals, but what you may not know is that Bayern Munich have a pretty good record in this department too. The Bavarians have knocked in nine goals from set piece play, a new league record.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich midfielder Konrad Laimer absolutely loves playing with Jamal Musiala
arts.sum: He’s making a lot of progress. He’s doing so outstandingly and is growing into the role,” Laimer enthused (as captured by Twitter account @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Mainz 05 vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Mainz 05 vs. Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: A wild swap rumor involving Bayern Munich and Real Madrid; FC Barcelona serious on Viktor Gyökeres; Manchester City wants Khvicha Kvaratskhelia; Real Madrid wants Ryan Gravenberch?; Xavi Simons too expensive for RB Leipzig?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will travel to Mainz 05 for a Bundesliga tilt where head coach Vincent Kompany will have to continue to work through the mini-injury crisis that is going on at the moment. Manchester City have identified Napoli’s Khvicha Kvaratskhelia as their top attacking target ahead of the January transfer window and will look to beat Barcelona, Liverpool and Real Madrid to his signature.

arts.ttl: Jan-Christian Dreesen stress importance of Bayern Munich reaching Champions League final at the Allianz Arena
arts.sum: Going into this season’s tournament, one might have been rather hard pressed to estimate that teams like Atalanta, AS Monaco, Aston Villa, or Brest would be occupying the top end of the table, but such has been the case at different stages thus far this season — it’s certainly added an element of intrigue a part from what has ordinarily been group stage play typically comprised of two stronger teams and two weaker teams. The new Champions League format that was introduced for this current season has been met with a mixed bag of reviews, and it has certainly yielded an interesting set of teams that occupy the top portion of the table.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich right-back Sacha Boey expresses his desire to play for the French national team
arts.sum: “That would of course be a great pleasure - and I work hard for that at the club,” Boey said (as captured by Twitter account @iMiaSanMia ). Sacha Boey put in a decent shift for Bayern Munich against Borussia Dortmund in his first game back after a long injury layover.

arts.ttl: FC Bayern Munich Asks Fans About Future Kit Details
arts.sum: To enhance fan engagement, FC Bayern Munich today launched a survey campaign today to gauge supporter preferences for future kit designs.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich eyeing Loris Karius to provide stopgap for goalkeeping position
arts.sum: Bayern are considering signing an experienced goalkeeper in January who could fill the number 2 role behind Daniel Peretz when Manuel Neuer and Sven Ulreich are out. There are two possibilities: Either to bring in a free agent like Loris Karius, or to sign a back-up from a Bundesliga or 2nd Bundesliga club in order to at least have a secure number 2 behind Peretz for the rest of the season.
